zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia de Berkeley於大約1258年出生在英國達勒姆蓋音福德時，她的父親Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie34歲，母親Bissett24歲。她和William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1296年8月28日在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪費亞享年39歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia de Berkeley于大约1258年出生在英国達勒姆蓋音福德时，她的父亲Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie34岁，母亲Bissett24岁。她和William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1296年8月28日在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪費亞享年39岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia de Berkeley was born about 1258, in Gainford, Durham, England, her father, Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie, was 34 and her mother, Bissett, was 24. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross. She died on 28 August 1296, in Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Linton, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia de Berkeley est née environ 1258, à Gainford, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Bissett, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1296, à Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Linton, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia de Berkeley um 1258 in Gainford, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie 34 und ihre Mutter Bissett 24. Sie hatte mit William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. August 1296 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Linton, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross. ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia de Berkeleyが約1258年にイギリスダルハムガインフォードで生まれた時，父Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towieは34歳，母Bissettは24歳であった。彼女はWilliam Ross 2nd Earl of Rossとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1296年8月28日にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイフエアルンで39歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia de Berkeley(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 뒤람 게인퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bissett(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 8월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 피른에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia de Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Gainford, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Bissett, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1296, em Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Linton, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Fearn, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, Unit: фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia de Berkeley родилась около 1258 г. в местности геинфорд, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Bissett, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от William Ross 2nd Earl of Ross. Она умерла 28 августа 1296 г. в местности фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности линтон, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
